tooltips.lockableFieldList: Fields that become read-only when an order is locked.
tooltips.productVariantSyncFieldList: Fields that are synced from a template to product variants.
tooltips.salesOrderSoftReserveStatusList: Statuses on which inventory is soft reserved.
tooltips.salesOrderDoneStatusList: Statuses indicating that a sales order is done.
tooltips.purchaseOrderDoneStatusList: Statuses indicating that a purchase order is done.
tooltips.purchaseOrderCanceledStatusList: Statuses indicating that an order is canceled.
tooltips.receiptOrderDoneStatusList: Statuses indicating that a receipt order is done.
tooltips.receiptOrderCanceledStatusList: Statuses indicating that a receipt order is canceled.
tooltips.salesOrderCanceledStatusList: Statuses indicating that an order is canceled.
tooltips.invoiceDoneStatusList: Statuses indicating that an invoice is done.
tooltips.invoiceCanceledStatusList: Statuses indicating that an invoice is canceled.
tooltips.invoicePreIssueStatusList: Statuses indicating that an invoice is not issued and not canceled.
tooltips.creditNoteDoneStatusList: Statuses indicating that a credit note is done.
tooltips.creditNoteCanceledStatusList: Statuses indicating that a credit note is canceled.
tooltips.quoteDoneStatusList: Statuses indicating that a quote is done.
tooltips.quoteCanceledStatusList: Statuses indicating that a quote is canceled.
tooltips.deliveryRequiredStatusList: Statuses on which a delivery order should be created.
tooltips.deliveryOrderCanceledStatusList: Statuses indicating that a delivery order is canceled. Inventory is automatically returned to stock.
tooltips.deliveryOrderReserveStatusList: Statuses on which inventory is reserved.
tooltips.deliveryOrderSoftReserveStatusList: Statuses on which inventory is soft reserved.
tooltips.deliveryOrderFailedStatusList: Statuses indicating that a delivery order could not be delivered. Inventory is not automatically returned to stock. Manual intervention might be required.
tooltips.deliveryOrderDoneStatusList: Statuses indicating that a delivery order is done.
tooltips.transferOrderCanceledStatusList: Statuses indicating that a transfer order is canceled. Inventory is automatically returned to stock.
tooltips.transferOrderReserveStatusList: Statuses on which inventory is reserved.
tooltips.transferOrderSoftReserveStatusList: Statuses on which inventory is soft reserved.
tooltips.transferOrderFailedStatusList: Statuses indicating that a transfer order could not be delivered. Inventory is not automatically returned to stock. Manual intervention might be required.
tooltips.transferOrderDoneStatusList: Statuses indicating that a transfer order is done.
tooltips.returnOrderDoneStatusList: Statuses indicating that a return order is done.
tooltips.returnOrderCanceledStatusList: Statuses indicating that a return order is canceled.
